string.name: task_title
string.value: INDEX-0: Build first playable visual blockout

string.name: task_description
string.value: Build the first playable INDEX-0 level area in Unreal Editor with spawn room, corridor, red warning light, visible DO NOT FOLLOW THE VOICES text, and basic horror atmosphere.

parameters.title: ={{ $json.task_title }}
parameters.body:
=### Goal
{{ $json.task_description }}

### Context
Auto-dispatched development task for MercyHF project.

### Target agent
* {{ $json.target_agent }}

### Level
* {{ $json.level }}

### Allowed files/systems
* Level-specific assets and maps (`Content/`)
* Blueprints related to `{{ $json.level }}` trigger logic

### Forbidden files/systems
* Core C++ files (`Source/`)
* Do not modify unrelated level maps or global configurations

### Acceptance criteria
* spawn room exists
* short path/corridor exists
* DO NOT FOLLOW THE VOICES is visible in PIE
* L_Entry_Red is visibly red
* player can walk in PIE
* changed .uasset/.umap files are reported

### Testing requirements
Run PIE in Index0_Game and confirm the visual blockout is playable.
